name: Roasted chicken with Jerusalem artichoke & lemon

ingredients.item: 1 lb / 450 g Jerusalem artichokes, peeled and cut lengthwise into 6 wedges ⅔ inch / 1.5 cm thick
ingredients.original: 1 lb / 450 g Jerusalem artichokes, peeled and cut lengthwise into 6 wedges ⅔ inch / 1.5 cm thick

ingredients.item: 8 skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs, or 1 medium whole chicken, quartered
ingredients.original: 8 skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs, or 1 medium whole chicken, quartered

ingredients.item: 12 banana or other large shallots, halved lengthwise
ingredients.original: 12 banana or other large shallots, halved lengthwise

ingredients.item: 1 medium lemon, halved lengthwise and then very thinly sliced
ingredients.original: 1 medium lemon, halved lengthwise and then very thinly sliced

ingredients.item: ¼ cup / 10 g fresh thyme leaves
ingredients.original: ¼ cup / 10 g fresh thyme leaves

ingredients.item: ½ tsp freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original: ½ tsp freshly ground black pepper
